summary: Average show with no standout moments; recording source and quality not discussed.
review: Both reviewers found the performance unremarkable – one calling it merely average with no highlights, another giving it a zero‑star rating tied to personal nostalgia rather than musical merit. No details about the audio source or sound clarity were mentioned, leaving the recording quality indeterminate.

ai_rating.rationale: Limited feedback (only two reviews) and overall negative/neutral comments suggest a below‑average performance with unclear recording quality, resulting in a low rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not provide any information about sound clarity, mix balance, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on set structure or pacing were provided.
